no: EXCLUDED: WeiDU 0xc0000005 access violation during install. Root cause analysis: 1) Massive manual INSERT_BYTES on 30+ area files with unsafe offset arithmetic — if any area was modified by another mod, offsets land wrong causing buffer overflow in WeiDU memory. Most likely crash cause. 2) WRITE_BYTE 0x2b bug (line 6784): writes to Animation ID offset instead of Wisdom (0x23b) on CMTMORW.CRE — corrupts creature but doesn't crash. 3) TIS files copied twice (from areas/ and PVRZ/) — second copy overwrites first. 4) COPY_EXISTING on mod-relative path (line 3437) — incorrect syntax. 5) 59 unused creature files in creatures/ dir (dead files, cre/ dir is the real one). Known EET bug: Oversight HQ door missing (AR0700->BG0700) — ahungry_tweaks fixes. SCS conflict: CMSTQ04.ITM blocks SCS AI install. 261 items with widespread usability flag bugs. GitHub: The-Gate-Project/DarkHorizons (author CoM_Solaufein inactive). File issue for crash + WRITE_BYTE bug. Known warning: ADD_WORLDMAP_LINKS uses invalid from_node (~N~), WeiDU defaults to all nodes. Non-fatal, travel links work correctly.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

conflicts.reason: Both mods modify shared BG1 area scripts. Compatible if Dark Horizons is installed BEFORE SotSC (per SotSC readme). SotSC expects Dark Horizons changes to already be present.
Generally compatible. Standard install order: Dark Horizons first, BG1 NPC Project after. Both add BG1 content but don't directly conflict.
Same mod content under two tp2 names (legacy vs EE packaging). Install only one version.
conflicts.source: Same GitHub repo (The-Gate-Project/DarkHorizons), single tp2 with GAME_IS checks, 2026-03

sum: Original Dark Horizons mod (legacy version) adding a BG1 quest chain. Use Dark Horizons BG:EE (512) instead for EE compatibility.

co.no: EXCLUDED: 0xc0000005 crash. Likely caused by memory corruption from unsafe INSERT_BYTES area patching (30+ areas with manual offset recalc, no bounds checks). On EET these are BG-prefixed areas potentially modified by other mods, making offset calculations invalid.
